description: Design settings for AHUON Post Hajj Dinner 2026 gate passes

event.name: AHUON Post Hajj Dinner 2026
event.organization: Association for Hajj & Umrah Operators of Nigeria (AHUON)

layout.description: Large QR dominates the pass, travel agency name as header below, compact metadata body underneath

cli_command: python3 -m gatepass_generator generate -i operators.csv -o ./passes --template template.pdf --qr-size 130 --qr-align center --qr-border 0 --qr-transparent --overlay-text "28 June 2026" --overlay-text "AHUON Post Hajj Dinner" --text-size 11 --text-size 9
